creator: freebsd@mgwsoftware.com
text:
Created attachment 164464
Patch updating sdlttf version for c6 and c6_64

/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.linux-apps.mk has outdated information for the version of linux-c6-sdl_ttf, which breaks any port with USE_LINUX_APPS= sdlttf on a system using c6 for the linux userland.

Attached patch updates library version in bsd.linux-apps.mk for c6 (both 32-bit and 64-bit)
